text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You want to go out somewhere... with me?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: It would be an honor! By all means—

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Ah, pardon me. I have to take this.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Yes, this is Hayakawa. Right... Mmhm... Well,
about that...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry... There's an urgent matter that I need to
attend to.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Um... Would it be okay if I take a rain check?
choice_data_list: I can wait until you're done!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Thank you! You're so kind!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry! I'll get everything wrapped up in a
jiffy!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I'm back!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: But it'll be dark soon, huh? I'm sorry...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
If we head out now, we can't go anywhere too far
away. Hm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tazuna and I rack our brains thinking of where we
can go, when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grumble...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: ...Was that you?
choice_data_list: I don't think it was only me...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Yes, you're right! I'm pretty hungry myself!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I just thought of a good place for us to go! Follow
me!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oh, good! There are seats open!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tazuna's recommendation is this rough-looking
ramen shop.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: This is my go-to place!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The ramen is great, of course, but the pan-fried
dumplings are to die for!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Let's eat a ton today! Since there are two
of us, let's order the jumbo set!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
After that, let's stop by the supermarket so I can
grab some milk!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so we spend the rest of the evening eating
delicious food together.
